movie.actors: Luke Evans, Sarah Gadon, Dominic Cooper, Art Parkinson
movie.plot: As his kingdom is being threatened by the Turks, young prince Vlad Tepes must become a monster feared by his own people in order to obtain the power needed to protect his own family, and the families of his kingdom.
movie.title: Dracula Untold
movie.writer: Matt Sazama (screenplay), Burk Sharpless (screenplay), Bram Stoker (characters)
